## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change

- [ ] New tool documentation
- [ ] Update existing documentation
- [ ] Fix errors or broken links
- [ ] Add cheatsheet
- [ ] Update README
- [ ] Other

## Tool name (if applicable)

If adding or updating tool documentation, list the tool name(s).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] Documentation follows the 8-chapter template
- [ ] YAML frontmatter includes all required fields
- [ ] Every command has an `**Explanation:**` line
- [ ] I have created a CHEATSHEET.md for new tools
- [ ] No placeholders (TBD, TODO, FIXME)
- [ ] No real credentials or sensitive information
